'''鈭歞h-l-f''' ('''dhalafa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jackshaft|jackshaft]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-l-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jackshaft|jackshaft]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-l-f
|-
! Lemma
| dhalafa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhalafithi|dhalafithi]] || [[word:dhalafiji|dhalafiji]] || [[word:dhalafishi|dhalafishi]] || [[word:dhalafi|dhalafi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhalafuthuth|dhalafuthuth]] || [[word:dhalafujuj|dhalafujuj]] || [[word:dhalafushush|dhalafushush]] || [[word:dhalaf|dhalaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhalafuthu|dhalafuthu]] || [[word:dhalafuju|dhalafuju]] || [[word:dhalafushu|dhalafushu]] || [[word:dhalafu|dhalafu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhalafufuth|dhalafufuth]] || [[word:dhalafufuj|dhalafufuj]] || [[word:dhalafufush|dhalafufush]] || [[word:dhalafuf|dhalafuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhalafethe|dhalafethe]] || [[word:dhalafeje|dhalafeje]] || [[word:dhalafeshe|dhalafeshe]] || [[word:dhalafe|dhalafe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhalafothoth|dhalafothoth]] || [[word:dhalafojoj|dhalafojoj]] || [[word:dhalafoshosh|dhalafoshosh]] || [[word:dhalaf|dhalaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhalafotho|dhalafotho]] || [[word:dhalafojo|dhalafojo]] || [[word:dhalafosho|dhalafosho]] || [[word:dhalafo|dhalafo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhalafofoth|dhalafofoth]] || [[word:dhalafofoj|dhalafofoj]] || [[word:dhalafofosh|dhalafofosh]] || [[word:dhalafof|dhalafof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhalaf忙th忙|dhalaf忙th忙]] || [[word:dhalaf忙j忙|dhalaf忙j忙]] || [[word:dhalaf忙sh忙|dhalaf忙sh忙]] || [[word:dhalaf忙|dhalaf忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhalafathath|dhalafathath]] || [[word:dhalafajaj|dhalafajaj]] || [[word:dhalafashash|dhalafashash]] || [[word:dhalaf|dhalaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhalafatha|dhalafatha]] || [[word:dhalafaja|dhalafaja]] || [[word:dhalafasha|dhalafasha]] || [[word:dhalafa|dhalafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhalafafath|dhalafafath]] || [[word:dhalafafaj|dhalafafaj]] || [[word:dhalafafash|dhalafafash]] || [[word:dhalafaf|dhalafaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:dhalafasha|dhalafasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:godhalafasha|godhalafasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokidhalafasha|gokidhalafasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhalafn眉sha|dhalafn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:godhalafnkn眉sha|godhalafnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokidhalafn眉sha|gokidhalafn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhalafsh毛sha|dhalafsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhalafnksh毛sha|godhalafnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhalafsh毛sha|gokidhalafsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhalafrosha|dhalafrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhalafnkrosha|godhalafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhalafrosha|gokidhalafrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhalafmusha|dhalafmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:godhalafnkmusha|godhalafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhalafmusha|gokidhalafmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:dhalafsherasha|dhalafsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:godhalafnksherasha|godhalafnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokidhalafsherasha|gokidhalafsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:dhalafngasha|dhalafngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:godhalafnkngasha|godhalafnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokidhalafngasha|gokidhalafngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhalafyasha|dhalafyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:godhalafnkyasha|godhalafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokidhalafyasha|gokidhalafyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:dhalafyamasha|dhalafyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:godhalafnkyamasha|godhalafnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokidhalafyamasha|gokidhalafyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhalafn眉sh毛sha|dhalafn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhalafnkn眉sh毛sha|godhalafnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhalafn眉sh毛sha|gokidhalafn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhalafn眉rosha|dhalafn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhalafnkn眉rosha|godhalafnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhalafn眉rosha|gokidhalafn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhalafn眉musha|dhalafn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhalafnkn眉musha|godhalafnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhalafn眉musha|gokidhalafn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhalafsh毛n眉sha|dhalafsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhalafnksh毛n眉sha|godhalafnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhalafsh毛n眉sha|gokidhalafsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhalafsh毛rosha|dhalafsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhalafnksh毛rosha|godhalafnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhalafsh毛rosha|gokidhalafsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhalafsh毛musha|dhalafsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhalafnksh毛musha|godhalafnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhalafsh毛musha|gokidhalafsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhalafron眉sha|dhalafron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhalafnkron眉sha|godhalafnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhalafron眉sha|gokidhalafron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhalafrosh毛sha|dhalafrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhalafnkrosh毛sha|godhalafnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhalafrosh毛sha|gokidhalafrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhalafromusha|dhalafromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhalafnkromusha|godhalafnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhalafromusha|gokidhalafromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhalafmun眉sha|dhalafmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhalafnkmun眉sha|godhalafnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhalafmun眉sha|gokidhalafmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhalafmush毛sha|dhalafmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhalafnkmush毛sha|godhalafnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhalafmush毛sha|gokidhalafmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhalafmurosha|dhalafmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhalafnkmurosha|godhalafnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhalafmurosha|gokidhalafmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:dhalaf|dhalaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:dh忙l忙f|dh忙l忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hodhalaf|hodhalaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hodh忙l忙f|hodh忙l忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodhalaf|hohodhalaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodh忙l忙f|hohodh忙l忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉dhalaf|n眉dhalaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉dh忙l忙f|n眉dh忙l忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉dhalaf|n眉n眉dhalaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉dh忙l忙f|n眉n眉dh忙l忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂dhalaf|n茂dhalaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂dh忙l忙f|n茂dh忙l忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂dhalaf|n茂n茂dhalaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂dh忙l忙f|n茂n茂dh忙l忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:ludhalaf|ludhalaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ludh忙l忙f|ludh忙l忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludhalaf|luludhalaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludh忙l忙f|luludh忙l忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lidhalaf|lidhalaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lidh忙l忙f|lidh忙l忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidhalaf|lilidhalaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidh忙l忙f|lilidh忙l忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kodhalaf|kodhalaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kodh忙l忙f|kodh忙l忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodhalaf|kokodhalaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodh忙l忙f|kokodh忙l忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kedhalaf|kedhalaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kedh忙l忙f|kedh忙l忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedhalaf|kekedhalaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedh忙l忙f|kekedh忙l忙f]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|386eaa0}}
